text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her day off, Winning Ticket storms into my
office with immense fervor.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Right? I know! Yesterday I ate lots and slept even
more!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So now I'm totally powered up—FULL BLAST!
Like, I'm in super-duper top condition!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Come on, time to start already! I can do a million
laps! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is brimming with power and spirit after
thoroughly enjoying her day off.
